title: Contact | Get in Touch Today — Anna Gelderd MP
meta_description: Contact Anna Gelderd MP for support, concerns, or inquiries about South East Cornwall. We
headings: h3: Need to Get in Touch?
h2: Wins for South East Cornwall
text_excerpt: Contact | Get in Touch Today — Anna Gelderd MP 0 Skip to Content Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Open Menu Close Menu Home About News Contact Campaigning Surgeries Help & Resources FAQs Newsletter Need to Get in Touch? Whether you need support with a personal issue, want to raise a concern, or just have something you’d like to share I would love to hear from you. My team and I are here to help constituents across South East Cornwall, and we aim to respond as quickly as we can. The reason I stood for election is because I want to help people and to make a real, positive difference to everyday lives. Often, it’s not the big headlines that matter most, but the quiet support or small changes that can really turn things around for someone. That’s what matters to me. To get the right help, please include: Your full name Full Address and Postcode (so we can confirm you're a constituent) A brief outline of your issue or enquiry There are some things MPs can help with and a few things we legally can’t . If you’re not sure, please check the FAQs page for a full guide on what support I can offer and visit Help & Resources to see where else you might be able to get help. If you’d like to book a surgery appointment, you can do that here. If your issue is urgent or sensitive, please mention that in your message. CASEWORK CHAMPION CASEWORK CHAMPION CASEWORK CHAMPION A big part of my job happens behind the scenes helping people across South East Cornwall with all sorts of problems: housing, benefits, healthcare, schools and more. Since being elected, I’ve helped thousands of residents resolve issues, get answers, and access the support they’re entitled to. Some of the most important wins are quiet ones — the kind that make a real difference to someone’s life but never make the headlines. From July 2024 to July 2025, I have received 17,528 emails on a huge range of topics, with 8,822 casework cases completed. Local topics that have really affected my constituents have been: Lack of NHS Dentists Bus route changes Threatened closure of Liskeard Post Office I have raised all these matters with the relevant ministers and received responses. There are now more than 7000 extra dental appointments offered, with local NHS dentists opening their appointment systems. Here’s a snapshot of what my team and I have been working on for you. Wins for South East Cornwall “ Thank you so much for all the work and time you have put in on my behalf. I really appreciate it and feel no longer powerless, thanks to you. If I may, I shall write to Mr Starmer to congratulate him on having such a caring MP who is genuinely concerned about her constituents. I know I was getting nowhere on my own and am so grateful to you. ” — Constituent of South East Cornwall. “ My team input has directly improved a number of Council Home Choice bandings, enabling constituents to bid for a house. ” “ My input has resulted in a family in unsuitable accommodation getting promptly rehoused. ” “ My office has stopped or paused several housing evictions, providing help and advice to ensure they stay in situ. ” “ My contact with DWP has turned around nonpayment of benefits,and have also managed to rectify long term errors with DWP and HMRC that had not been addressed. ” Stay in the loop Sign up with your email address to receive news and updates. Email Address Sign Up View our privacy policy here Thank you! Anna Gelderd MP South East Cornwall Constituency House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA Tel: 07783 636284 anna.gelderd.mp@parliament.uk © 2025 Anna Gelderd MP
